## Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Open Raycast
2. Run 'Find Duplicates'
3. Select '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.

## Environment
- macOS version: [e.g. 14.0]
- Raycast version: [e.g. 1.70]
- File Deduplicator CLI version: [e.g. 1.0.0]

## Additional Context
Any other context about the problem.
